moves.rationale: Causal: master width 1.1 = subtle widen for stereo image enhancement. Interactional: 10% wider preserves mono compatibility while adding sense of space. Idiomatic: streaming-safe master width tendency for electronic genres.

inspired_by.excerpt: stereo_width 0.14 — could benefit from subtle widen

moves.rationale: Causal: bass bus needs subtle glue for inter-section consistency. Interactional: 1.7:1 ratio with slow attack preserves transients while gluing tail. Idiomatic: SSL-style bus glue, GR target 1-2 dB.

inspired_by.excerpt: Dynamics 65 — moderate cohesion need on Bass Rythm

rationale: Sample test drive : master stereo widen + Bass Rythm bus glue.
